external_tools.name: hpi
external_tools.purpose: Query karlicoss/HPI personal-data modules as JSON (hpi query my.<module>.<fn> -o json --stream)
external_tools.install_hint: pip install HPI; configure each module's my.config (export_path) on the host. See https://github.com/karlicoss/HPI/blob/master/doc/SETUP.org

refresh_policy.rationale: HPI reads user-provided exports on disk configured via my.config; refresh cadence follows how often the owner refreshes those exports. No live login, so background runs are safe but only see data as fresh as the on-disk export.

streams.name: reddit_saved
streams.description: Reddit saved posts and comments, via HPI my.reddit.all.saved (which wraps the user's Reddit export/DAL).

display.label: Your saved Reddit items (via HPI)
display.detail: Saved posts and comments as HPI returns them: id, subreddit, title/body, created time, permalink.

streams.name: reddit_comments
streams.description: Reddit comments authored by the owner, via HPI my.reddit.all.comments.

display.label: Your Reddit comments (via HPI)
display.detail: Comment id, subreddit, body, created time, permalink.

streams.name: commits
streams.description: Git commits across the owner's repos, via HPI my.coding.commits.commits.

display.label: Your git commits (via HPI)
display.detail: Commit sha, repo, message, authored/committed timestamps.
